case_number: Criminal case emanating from Crime No.01/2025

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA. Cr. Bail Appln.No.S- 108 of 2025. DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE 1.For orders on office objection as flag A. 2.For hearing of bail application. 17.3.2025. Mr. Ghulam Muhammad Bareejo, advocate for the applicant. Mr. Nazir Ahmed Bangwar, D.P.G. O R D E R KHALID HUSSAIN SHAHANI-J.- Through this application, the applicant Yaseen Khoso seeks post arrest bail in Criminal case emanating from Crime No.01/2025, registered at PS Seehar for offences under section 3/4, Hudood Ordinance, after his bail plea has been declined by the trial Court vide order dated 18.02.2025. As per prosecution theory, the incident took place on 03.02.2024, when the applicant/accused was arrested along with co- accused Rajesh Kumar by police of PS Seehar and 240 half bottles of wine, in both red and white varies were recovered from them. Heard learned counsel for the applicant and Learned D.P.G for the State. The latter recorded no objection for grant of bail on the rule of consistency. Since co-accused Rajesh Kumar on same sort of allegations is already on bail granted by this court vide order dated 10-03-2025, therefore, applicant also deserves same concession on the rule of consistency. Accordingly, he is admitted to bail, in sum of Rs.50,000/- subject to furnish solvent surety and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of learned trial court. JUDGE Asghar Altaf/P.A
